name: Apple and Potato Cake (Bakestone Recipes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the peeled potatoes in well-salted water until hot and floury.
2. Drain and cover with a cloth to "dry in their steam".
3. In a warmed mixing bowl, sieve or rice the potatoes and beat in the softened butter.
4. Work in sufficient self-raising flour to make the dough manageable, adding salt to taste.
5. Divide the dough into two equal portions.
6. Roll or pat each portion into rounds of equal size, just over 1/2 inch thick.
7. Place one round on the warmed bakestone and spread with chopped apples.
8. Cover with the other round of dough and pinch the edges together.
9. Bake on the bakestone over a moderate heat until brown underneath.
10. Using the broadest spatula available, turn the cake and cook the other side.
11. Remove the cake to a hot serving dish.
12. Carefully peel up one side of the top of the cake.
13. Spread the apples with softened butter and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
14. Fold that half down and repeat on the other side.
15. Sprinkle sugar on top and serve immediately, with thick cool cream.
